Objective: Test AppManager activate API - Activation scenarios
Key_Assertions: activate API should return appropriate responses for Activation scenarios

Objective: Test AppManager launchApp API - Positive scenarios
Key_Assertions: launchApp API should return appropriate responses for valid launch parameters

Objective: Test AppManager launchApp API - Negative scenarios
Key_Assertions: launchApp API should handle error conditions and invalid parameters

Objective: Test AppManager preloadApp API - Positive scenarios
Key_Assertions: preloadApp API should return appropriate responses for preloading apps

Objective: Test AppManager preloadApp API - Negative scenarios
Key_Assertions: preloadApp API should handle invalid apps and error conditions

Objective: Test AppManager closeApp API - Positive scenarios
Key_Assertions: closeApp API should successfully close running apps

Objective: Test AppManager closeApp API - Negative scenarios
Key_Assertions: closeApp API should handle non-existent or already-closed apps

Objective: Test AppManager terminateApp API - Positive scenarios
Key_Assertions: terminateApp API should forcefully terminate apps

Objective: Test AppManager terminateApp API - Negative scenarios
Key_Assertions: terminateApp API should handle invalid app IDs and error conditions

Objective: Test AppManager killApp API - Positive scenarios
Key_Assertions: killApp API should immediately kill running apps

Objective: Test AppManager killApp API - Negative scenarios
Key_Assertions: killApp API should handle non-existent apps and invalid parameters

Objective: Test AppManager isInstalled API - Positive scenarios
Key_Assertions: isInstalled API should correctly identify installed apps

Objective: Test AppManager isInstalled API - Negative scenarios
Key_Assertions: isInstalled API should return false for non-existent apps

Objective: Test AppManager getInstalledApps API - Query scenarios
Key_Assertions: getInstalledApps should return list of all installed applications

Objective: Test AppManager getLoadedApps API - Query scenarios
Key_Assertions: getLoadedApps should return list of currently loaded/running applications

Objective: Test AppManager sendIntent API - Positive scenarios
Key_Assertions: sendIntent API should send intents to apps successfully

Objective: Test AppManager sendIntent API - Negative scenarios
Key_Assertions: sendIntent API should handle invalid intents and non-existent apps

Objective: Test AppManager startSystemApp API - Positive scenarios
Key_Assertions: startSystemApp API should start system apps successfully

Objective: Test AppManager startSystemApp API - Negative scenarios
Key_Assertions: startSystemApp API should handle invalid system apps

Objective: Test AppManager stopSystemApp API - Positive scenarios
Key_Assertions: stopSystemApp API should stop system apps successfully

Objective: Test AppManager stopSystemApp API - Negative scenarios
Key_Assertions: stopSystemApp API should handle invalid system apps

Objective: Test AppManager clearAppData API - Positive scenarios
Key_Assertions: clearAppData API should clear app-specific data successfully

Objective: Test AppManager clearAppData API - Negative scenarios
Key_Assertions: clearAppData API should handle invalid apps and error conditions

Objective: Test AppManager clearAllAppData API - Query scenarios
Key_Assertions: clearAllAppData API should clear all app data from the system

Objective: Test AppManager getAppMetadata API - Positive scenarios
Key_Assertions: getAppMetadata should retrieve app metadata (name

Objective: Test AppManager getAppMetadata API - Negative scenarios
Key_Assertions: getAppMetadata should handle non-existent apps appropriately

Objective: Test AppManager getAppProperty API - Positive scenarios
Key_Assertions: getAppProperty should retrieve app properties (state

Objective: Test AppManager getAppProperty API - Negative scenarios
Key_Assertions: getAppProperty should handle invalid properties and non-existent apps

Objective: Test AppManager setAppProperty API - Positive scenarios
Key_Assertions: setAppProperty should set app properties successfully

Objective: Test AppManager setAppProperty API - Negative scenarios
Key_Assertions: setAppProperty should handle invalid properties and values

Objective: Test AppManager getMaxRunningApps API - Property scenarios
Key_Assertions: getMaxRunningApps should return max concurrent running apps

Objective: Test AppManager getMaxHibernatedApps API - Property scenarios
Key_Assertions: getMaxHibernatedApps should return max hibernated apps

Objective: Test AppManager getMaxHibernatedFlashUsage API - Property scenarios
Key_Assertions: getMaxHibernatedFlashUsage should return max hibernation flash storage limit

Objective: Test AppManager getMaxInactiveRamUsage API - Property scenarios
Key_Assertions: getMaxInactiveRamUsage should return max inactive RAM usage limit
